goals.objective: Implement documented product import enrichment, ShoppingConnect link management/placement, performance-to-package binding, revenue or conversion pattern aggregation, and Company Memory reuse so product, performance, and memory screens operate from real persisted data.

goals.title: Complete compliance export and persistence governance
goals.objective: Implement documented compliance coverage, export bundle fidelity, storage/audit metadata, migration reproducibility, and retention cleanup for production-readiness while preserving fail-closed security behavior.

steering.rationale: Compliance, export, and persistence governance are release gates and should be delivered as one auditable backend story.

goals.evidence: Implemented G009 compliance export and persistence governance: compliance rules now cover shopping disclosure, price notice, source attribution, unsupported claims, direct-use claims, and content depth; high issues remain fail-closed, medium dismissal requires audit reason and recomputes export readiness, and UI uses the returned compliance check. Export now has strict request parsing, issue-level fail-closed readiness replay, actual PK ZIP bundle payload with manifest, styled escaped HTML, binary ZIP download, storage/audit metadata with byte-size/checksum from artifact bytes, deterministic schema/migration coverage, and retention cleanup dry-run/execute fail-closed validation.
